channel.title: Content on Flax & Teal
channel.description: Recent content in Content on Flax & Teal

item.title: Publishing blog posts with GitHub
item.description: Our blog now publishes directly from GitHub. Instead of editing site files manually, Flax & Teal staff can run the Publish Blog Post workflow in GitHub and fill out a short form. The workflow will create a new Markdown file in content/blog, commit it to the repository, and trigger the normal site deployment pipeline. How the workflow works Go to Actions → Publish Blog Post → Run workflow in GitHub. Enter the post Title, Author, and a short Summary (used on the listing page).
